Men's Nano Puff Jacket

Windproof, water-resistant and highly compressible with synthetic insulation that stays warm even when wet.

Features

  • Lightweight, windproof shell made of 100% recycled polyester ripstop
  • 60-g PrimaLoft Gold Insulation Eco with 55% postconsumer recycled content
  • Zippered handwarmer pockets; internal chest pocket doubles as stuffsack
  • Packs into internal chest pocket with carabiner clip-in loop
  • Adjustable hem and cuffs seal in warmth
  • Fair Trade Certified sewn

Specifications

Weight 10.8 oz (306 g)
Material 1.4-oz 22-denier 100% recycled polyester ripstop
Insulation 60-g PrimaLoft Gold Insulation Eco
Country of Origin Vietnam
Lagom Blue
Black
Nouveau Green
XS S M L XL XXL
